definitions.zh: 输出披露是以输出披露活动为关键概念的本体边界；DisclosureActivity 及其 DisclosureSelectionActivity、DisclosureTruncationActivity、DisclosureSuppressionActivity 和 DisclosurePublicationActivity 阶段。 其成员归属遵循：当对象的身份由一次 DisclosureActivity、其选择/截断/抑制/发布阶段、面向受众的 DisclosureRecord 或实际显示范围决定时，在此拥有。
definitions.en: Output disclosure is the ontology boundary anchored by the key notion Output disclosure activity; DisclosureActivity and its DisclosureSelectionActivity, DisclosureTruncationActivity, DisclosureSuppressionActivity, and DisclosurePublicationActivity phases. Membership follows: Own an object when its identity is determined by one DisclosureActivity, its selection, truncation, suppression, or publication phase, an audience-facing DisclosureRecord, or an actual displayed range.
definitions.ja: 出力開示は出力開示活動を主要概念とするオントロジー境界です。DisclosureActivity と、その DisclosureSelectionActivity、DisclosureTruncationActivity、DisclosureSuppressionActivity、DisclosurePublicationActivity phase。 所属判定は次に従います：対象が一 DisclosureActivity、その selection/truncation/suppression/publication phase、audience-facing DisclosureRecord、actual displayed range で識別される場合に所有します。

purpose.zh: 以 DisclosureActivity 为关键概念，记录运行结果如何被选择、截断、抑制和发布，以及最终向特定受众显示了哪些片段。
purpose.en: Use DisclosureActivity as the key notion to record how runtime results are selected, truncated, suppressed, and published and which fragments are ultimately shown to a particular audience.
purpose.ja: DisclosureActivity を中核概念として、runtime result の selection、truncation、suppression、publication と、特定 audience に最終表示された fragment を記録します。

includes.zh: DisclosureActivity 及其 DisclosureSelectionActivity、DisclosureTruncationActivity、DisclosureSuppressionActivity 和 DisclosurePublicationActivity 阶段。
includes.en: DisclosureActivity and its DisclosureSelectionActivity, DisclosureTruncationActivity, DisclosureSuppressionActivity, and DisclosurePublicationActivity phases.
DisclosureRecord, DisclosureArtifact, OutputWindow, HeadTailWindow, DisclosedOutputSegment, SuppressedContext, and TruncatedContextSpan.

excludes.zh: 敏感信息识别、DisclosureRule、Redaction 与安全抑制归披露与脱敏；这里应用其决定并记录实际显示结果。
excludes.en: Sensitive-data identification, DisclosureRule, Redaction, and security suppression belong to disclosure and redaction; this scope applies their decisions and records what was actually shown.
excludes.ja: 機微情報識別、DisclosureRule、Redaction、安全抑制は開示と墨消しに属し、ここでは判断を適用し実際の表示結果を記録します。

excludes.zh: ContextWindow、上下文预算和 ContextPackage 归上下文组装；输出窗口只限制外显片段。
excludes.en: ContextWindow, context budgets, and ContextPackage belong to context assembly; an output window only limits externally visible fragments.
excludes.ja: ContextWindow、コンテキスト予算、ContextPackage はコンテキスト組み立てに属し、出力窓は外部表示断片だけを制限します。

description.zh: 输出披露的输入概念族为输出片段、可见上下文窗口；责任交接由已接受事实 输出披露记录 —references→ 输出片段 (DisclosureRecord-references-OutputSegment)；上下文选择决定 —selects_from→ 可见上下文窗口 (ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow) 明确给出。
description.en: The input families for Output disclosure are output segment, visible context window; the accepted facts Output disclosure record —references→ output segment (DisclosureRecord-references-OutputSegment); context selection decision —selects_from→ visible context window (ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 出力開示の入力概念族は出力区間、可視コンテキストウィンドウです。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 出力開示記録 —references→ 出力区間 (DisclosureRecord-references-OutputSegment)；コンテキスト選択判断 —selects_from→ 可視コンテキストウィンドウ (ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow) により明示されます。

description.zh: 输出披露的输出概念族为输出披露记录、已披露输出片段；责任交接由已接受事实 输出披露活动 —produces→ 输出披露记录 (DisclosureActivity-produces-DisclosureRecord)；披露发布活动 —produces→ 已披露输出片段 (DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment) 明确给出。
description.en: The output families for Output disclosure are Output disclosure record, disclosed output segment; the accepted facts Output disclosure activity —produces→ Output disclosure record (DisclosureActivity-produces-DisclosureRecord); Disclosure publication activity —produces→ disclosed output segment (DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 出力開示の出力概念族は出力開示記録、開示済み出力区間です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 出力開示活動 —produces→ 出力開示記録 (DisclosureActivity-produces-DisclosureRecord)；開示公開活動 —produces→ 開示済み出力区間 (DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment) により明示されます。

description.zh: 输出披露的失败概念族为披露抑制活动、已抑制上下文；责任交接由已接受事实 披露抑制活动 —suppresses→ 已抑制上下文 (DisclosureSuppressionActivity-suppresses-SuppressedContext) 明确给出。
description.en: The failure families for Output disclosure are Disclosure suppression activity, suppressed context; the accepted facts Disclosure suppression activity —suppresses→ suppressed context (DisclosureSuppressionActivity-suppresses-SuppressedContext) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 出力開示の失敗概念族は開示抑制活動、抑制済みコンテキストです。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 開示抑制活動 —suppresses→ 抑制済みコンテキスト (DisclosureSuppressionActivity-suppresses-SuppressedContext) により明示されます。

not_applicable_reason.zh: 该本体不负责启动恢复流程。安全策略、运行结果或上下文组装需要核对最终显示范围而不重新定义披露活动时，引用这里的决定和记录。
not_applicable_reason.en: This ontology does not initiate a recovery workflow. Safety policy, runtime results, or context assembly references decisions and records here when checking the final displayed range without redefining disclosure activity.
not_applicable_reason.ja: このオントロジーは回復ワークフローを開始しません。安全方針、実行結果、コンテキスト組み立てが開示活動を再定義せず最終表示範囲を確認するとき、ここで定義した判断と記録を参照します。

decision_note.zh: 输出披露与披露与脱敏按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Output disclosure and Disclosure and redaction are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 出力開示と開示と墨消しは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 输出披露与披露与脱敏按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Output disclosure and Disclosure and redaction are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 出力開示と開示と墨消しは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 输出披露与披露与脱敏按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Output disclosure and Disclosure and redaction are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 出力開示と開示と墨消しは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 输出披露与披露与脱敏按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Output disclosure and Disclosure and redaction are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 出力開示と開示と墨消しは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

labels.zh: 某个运行结果向指定受众实际显示了哪些片段，哪些被截断或抑制？：正例
labels.en: Which fragments of a runtime result were actually shown to a specified audience, and which were truncated or suppressed?: positive case
labels.ja: ある実行結果のどの断片が指定受け手へ実際に表示され、どれが切詰めまたは抑制されましたか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例以 输出披露记录、报告产物、已披露输出片段、导出产物 作边界比较；问题“某个运行结果向指定受众实际显示了哪些片段，哪些被截断或抑制？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
descriptions.en: The positive case compares Output disclosure record, report artifact, disclosed output segment, export artifact at the ownership boundary. The question “Which fragments of a runtime result were actually shown to a specified audience, and which were truncated or suppressed?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.
descriptions.ja: 正例は 出力開示記録、報告成果物、開示済み出力区間、エクスポート成果物 を所有境界で比較します。質問「ある実行結果のどの断片が指定受け手へ実際に表示され、どれが切詰めまたは抑制されましたか。」は関連オントロジーを境界対照として使いますが、その読みに根拠を与える承認済みの非分類モジュール間関係は canonical グラフにありません。そのため例証は双方の候補概念を並置し、実行時の受け渡しを主張しません。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Displayed and withheld ranges form a non-overlapping accounting of the considered output, each linked to its decision.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Displayed and withheld ranges form a non-overlapping accounting of the considered output, each linked to its decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Displayed and withheld ranges form a non-overlapping accounting of the considered output, each linked to its decision.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ info-output-disclosure-cq-visible-fragments-v3 (info-output-disclosure.visible-fragments), owned by info-output-disclosure and compared with runtime-artifacts. The source does not define Moonweave CQ info-output-disclosure-cq-visible-fragments-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "For one DisclosureRecord and audience, return source fragment ranges with display, truncate, or suppress outcomes in source order." and expected assertion "Displayed and withheld ranges form a non-overlapping accounting of the considered output, each linked to its decision." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-deepagents-js-docs at Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ info-output-disclosure-cq-visible-fragments-v3 (info-output-disclosure.visible-fragments), owned by info-output-disclosure and compared with runtime-artifacts. The source does not define Moonweave CQ info-output-disclosure-cq-visible-fragments-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "For one DisclosureRecord and audience, return source fragment ranges with display, truncate, or suppress outcomes in source order." and expected assertion "Displayed and withheld ranges form a non-overlapping accounting of the considered output, each linked to its decision." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 某个运行结果向指定受众实际显示了哪些片段，哪些被截断或抑制？：反例
labels.en: Which fragments of a runtime result were actually shown to a specified audience, and which were truncated or suppressed?: counterexample
labels.ja: ある実行結果のどの断片が指定受け手へ実際に表示され、どれが切詰めまたは抑制されましたか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“某个运行结果向指定受众实际显示了哪些片段，哪些被截断或抑制？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Which fragments of a runtime result were actually shown to a specified audience, and which were truncated or suppressed?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「ある実行結果のどの断片が指定受け手へ実際に表示され、どれが切詰めまたは抑制されましたか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ info-output-disclosure-cq-visible-fragments-v3 (info-output-disclosure.visible-fragments), owned by info-output-disclosure and compared with runtime-artifacts. The source does not define Moonweave CQ info-output-disclosure-cq-visible-fragments-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "For one DisclosureRecord and audience, return source fragment ranges with display, truncate, or suppress outcomes in source order." and expected assertion "Displayed and withheld ranges form a non-overlapping accounting of the considered output, each linked to its decision." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

labels.zh: 首尾窗口或长度窗口如何应用到内容片段，实际边界与不可变上下文版本有何关系？：正例
labels.en: How is a head/tail or length window applied to content fragments, and how do actual boundaries relate to the immutable context version?: positive case
labels.ja: 先頭・末尾窓または長さ窓は内容断片へどう適用され、実際の境界は不変コンテキスト版とどう関係しますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：可见上下文窗口 —conforms_to→ 输出窗口 (VisibleContextWindow-conforms_to-OutputWindow)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: visible context window —conforms_to→ output window (VisibleContextWindow-conforms_to-OutputWindow).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：可視コンテキストウィンドウ —conforms_to→ 出力ウィンドウ (VisibleContextWindow-conforms_to-OutputWindow)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：OutputWindow determines visible source ranges only; it neither owns nor mutates ContextWindow or ContextPackage.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: OutputWindow determines visible source ranges only; it neither owns nor mutates ContextWindow or ContextPackage.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：OutputWindow determines visible source ranges only; it neither owns nor mutates ContextWindow or ContextPackage.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ info-output-disclosure-cq-window-application-v3 (info-output-disclosure.window-application), owned by info-output-disclosure and compared with memory-context. The source does not define Moonweave CQ info-output-disclosure-cq-window-application-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Apply OutputWindow to referenced source ranges and compare the result with DisclosureRecord boundaries and cited ContextPackage version." and expected assertion "OutputWindow determines visible source ranges only; it neither owns nor mutates ContextWindow or ContextPackage." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.

labels.zh: 一项安全披露决定如何改变最终显示，安全变换和实际披露是否都有独立证据？：正例
labels.en: How does a safety-disclosure decision change final display, and are the security transformation and actual disclosure independently evidenced?: positive case
labels.ja: 安全開示判断は最終表示をどう変え、安全変換と実際の開示はそれぞれ独立した証拠を持ちますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：已抑制上下文 —suppressed_by_rule→ 披露规则 (suppressed_by_rule)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: suppressed context —suppressed_by_rule→ disclosure rule (suppressed_by_rule).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：抑制済みコンテキスト —suppressed_by_rule→ 開示規則 (suppressed_by_rule)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：The safety scope owns policy and transformation; this scope owns the resulting audience-facing record, with an explicit link between them.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: The safety scope owns policy and transformation; this scope owns the resulting audience-facing record, with an explicit link between them.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：The safety scope owns policy and transformation; this scope owns the resulting audience-facing record, with an explicit link between them.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。

labels.zh: 一项安全披露决定如何改变最终显示，安全变换和实际披露是否都有独立证据？：反例
labels.en: How does a safety-disclosure decision change final display, and are the security transformation and actual disclosure independently evidenced?: counterexample
labels.ja: 安全開示判断は最終表示をどう変え、安全変換と実際の開示はそれぞれ独立した証拠を持ちますか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“一项安全披露决定如何改变最终显示，安全变换和实际披露是否都有独立证据？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “How does a safety-disclosure decision change final display, and are the security transformation and actual disclosure independently evidenced?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「安全開示判断は最終表示をどう変え、安全変換と実際の開示はそれぞれ独立した証拠を持ちますか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

questions.zh: 某个运行结果向指定受众实际显示了哪些片段，哪些被截断或抑制？
questions.en: Which fragments of a runtime result were actually shown to a specified audience, and which were truncated or suppressed?
questions.ja: ある実行結果のどの断片が指定受け手へ実際に表示され、どれが切詰めまたは抑制されましたか。

competency_questions.query: For one DisclosureRecord and audience, return source fragment ranges with display, truncate, or suppress outcomes in source order.
competency_questions.expected_assertion: Displayed and withheld ranges form a non-overlapping accounting of the considered output, each linked to its decision.

not_applicable_reason.zh: 问题“某个运行结果向指定受众实际显示了哪些片段，哪些被截断或抑制？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
not_applicable_reason.en: The question “Which fragments of a runtime result were actually shown to a specified audience, and which were truncated or suppressed?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.
not_applicable_reason.ja: 質問「ある実行結果のどの断片が指定受け手へ実際に表示され、どれが切詰めまたは抑制されましたか。」は関連オントロジーを境界対照として使いますが、その読みに根拠を与える承認済みの非分類モジュール間関係は canonical グラフにありません。そのため例証は双方の候補概念を並置し、実行時の受け渡しを主張しません。

owns_when.zh: 当对象的身份由一次 DisclosureActivity、其选择/截断/抑制/发布阶段、面向受众的 DisclosureRecord 或实际显示范围决定时，在此拥有。
owns_when.en: Own an object when its identity is determined by one DisclosureActivity, its selection, truncation, suppression, or publication phase, an audience-facing DisclosureRecord, or an actual displayed range.
owns_when.ja: 対象が一 DisclosureActivity、その selection/truncation/suppression/publication phase、audience-facing DisclosureRecord、actual displayed range で識別される場合に所有します。

references_when.zh: 安全策略、运行结果或上下文组装需要核对最终显示范围而不重新定义披露活动时，引用这里的决定和记录。
references_when.en: Safety policy, runtime results, or context assembly references decisions and records here when checking the final displayed range without redefining disclosure activity.
references_when.ja: 安全方針、実行結果、コンテキスト組み立てが開示活動を再定義せず最終表示範囲を確認するとき、ここで定義した判断と記録を参照します。

rationale.zh: 输出披露拥有实际面向受众的选择、窗口和显示记录；披露与脱敏拥有敏感识别、允许规则、遮蔽变换和安全决定。 本条仅记录 DisclosureActivity、OutputWindow、SuppressedContext；其 canonical owner 是输出披露（info-output-disclosure），因此 info-output-disclosure 在此拥有这些概念。
rationale.en: Output disclosure owns audience-facing selection, windows, and display records; disclosure and redaction own sensitivity detection, allow rules, masking transformations, and security decisions. This record is limited to DisclosureActivity, OutputWindow, SuppressedContext; their canonical owner is Output disclosure (info-output-disclosure), so info-output-disclosure owns these concepts here.
rationale.ja: 出力開示は受け手向け選択、窓、表示記録を所有し、開示と墨消しは機微識別、許可規則、遮蔽変換、安全判断を所有します。 この記録は DisclosureActivity、OutputWindow、SuppressedContext だけを対象とし、canonical owner は出力開示（info-output-disclosure）です。したがって info-output-disclosure はここでこれらを所有します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used to compare info-output-disclosure with safety-disclosure-redaction, including DisclosureActivity, OutputWindow, SuppressedContext. The source does not define Moonweave Modules info-output-disclosure or safety-disclosure-redaction, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under info-output-disclosure's owns_when "Own an object when its identity is determined by one DisclosureActivity, its selection, truncation, suppression, or publication phase, an audience-facing DisclosureRecord, or an actual displayed range.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "If the object is identifiable by audience, range, and display outcome even without a security reason, it belongs to output disclosure; if identity depends on sensitivity class, rule, or redaction algorithm, it belongs to disclosure and redaction."; result=owns and owner=info-output-disclosure are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

rationale.ja: output disclosure は audience-facing output selection、truncation、suppression、publication、audit record を所有し、context assembly は invocation 前 ContextPackage、Window、Slot、input budget を所有します。 この記録は VisibleContextWindow だけを対象とし、canonical owner はコンテキスト組み立て（memory-context）です。したがって info-output-disclosure はここでこれらを参照します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used to compare info-output-disclosure with memory-context, including VisibleContextWindow. The source does not define Moonweave Modules info-output-disclosure or memory-context, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under info-output-disclosure's owns_when "Own an object when its identity is determined by one DisclosureActivity, its selection, truncation, suppression, or publication phase, an audience-facing DisclosureRecord, or an actual displayed range.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "If the decision occurs before model or tool execution and forms an input package, it belongs to context assembly; if it occurs after result production and binds an audience, it belongs to output disclosure."; result=references and owner=memory-context are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

semantic_area.zh: 实际显示抑制与安全披露抑制
semantic_area.en: Display suppression versus security disclosure suppression
semantic_area.ja: 実際の表示抑制と安全開示抑制

overlap_reason.zh: 两者都可能产生 suppressed 结果，但显示面回答最终看到了什么，安全面回答依据何种敏感规则做了什么变换。 本条仅记录 OutputWindow、SuppressedContext；其 canonical owner 是输出披露（info-output-disclosure），因此 info-output-disclosure 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Both may yield a suppressed outcome, but the display side answers what was ultimately seen while the security side answers which sensitive rule caused which transformation. This record is limited to OutputWindow, SuppressedContext; their canonical owner is Output disclosure (info-output-disclosure), so info-output-disclosure owns these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: どちらも suppressed 結果を生み得ますが、表示側は最終的に何が見えたか、安全側はどの機微規則でどの変換を行ったかを答えます。 この記録は OutputWindow、SuppressedContext だけを対象とし、canonical owner は出力開示（info-output-disclosure）です。したがって info-output-disclosure はここでこれらを所有します。

disambiguation_test.zh: 若对象即使没有安全原因也可由受众、范围和显示结果识别，则归输出披露；若身份依赖敏感分类、规则或脱敏算法，则归披露与脱敏。
disambiguation_test.en: If the object is identifiable by audience, range, and display outcome even without a security reason, it belongs to output disclosure; if identity depends on sensitivity class, rule, or redaction algorithm, it belongs to disclosure and redaction.
disambiguation_test.ja: 安全理由がなくても受け手、範囲、表示結果で識別できれば出力開示、同一性が機微分類、規則、墨消しアルゴリズムに依存すれば開示と墨消しに属します。

semantic_area.zh: 披露视图记录与持久运行产物
semantic_area.en: Disclosure-view records versus persistent runtime artifacts
semantic_area.ja: disclosure view record と persistent runtime artifact

overlap_reason.zh: Artifact 可成为披露输入或输出内容，但针对受众的可见片段与抑制理由是一次披露活动的事实，不创建新的 Artifact 子类。 本条仅记录 DisclosedOutputSegment、DisclosureRecord；其 canonical owner 是输出披露（info-output-disclosure），因此 info-output-disclosure 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: An Artifact can be disclosure input or output content, but audience-specific visible segments and suppression reasons are facts of a disclosure activity, not new Artifact subtypes. This record is limited to DisclosedOutputSegment, DisclosureRecord; their canonical owner is Output disclosure (info-output-disclosure), so info-output-disclosure owns these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: Artifact は disclosure input/output content になれますが、audience-specific visible segment と suppression reason は disclosure activity の事実で、新 Artifact subtype ではありません。 この記録は DisclosedOutputSegment、DisclosureRecord だけを対象とし、canonical owner は出力開示（info-output-disclosure）です。したがって info-output-disclosure はここでこれらを所有します。

disambiguation_test.en: An object identified by audience, window, selection, and disclosure outcome belongs to output disclosure; one identified by artifact ID, digest, version, and storage lineage belongs to runtime artifacts.
disambiguation_test.ja: audience・window・selection・disclosure outcome で識別されれば output disclosure、artifact id・digest・version・storage lineage で識別されれば runtime artifact に属します。

semantic_area.zh: 输入上下文选择与输出披露选择
semantic_area.ja: input context selection と output disclosure selection

overlap_reason.zh: 两者都可能裁剪内容，但前者控制提供给运行的输入，后者控制允许向某受众显示的输出，时间点与政策依据不同。 本条仅记录 ContextSelectionDecision、OutputWindow；其 canonical owner 是输出披露（info-output-disclosure），因此 info-output-disclosure 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Both may trim content, but the former controls input supplied to execution while the latter controls output visible to an audience; timing and policy basis differ. This record is limited to ContextSelectionDecision, OutputWindow; their canonical owner is Output disclosure (info-output-disclosure), so info-output-disclosure owns these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: どちらも content を trim しますが、前者は execution input、後者は audience-visible output を制御し、時点と policy basis が異なります。 この記録は ContextSelectionDecision、OutputWindow だけを対象とし、canonical owner は出力開示（info-output-disclosure）です。したがって info-output-disclosure はここでこれらを所有します。

disambiguation_test.zh: 若决定发生在模型或工具执行前并形成输入 package，归上下文组装；若决定发生在结果产生后并绑定 audience，归输出披露。
disambiguation_test.en: If the decision occurs before model or tool execution and forms an input package, it belongs to context assembly; if it occurs after result production and binds an audience, it belongs to output disclosure.
disambiguation_test.ja: model/tool execution 前に input package を作る decision は context assembly、result 生成後に audience を束縛する decision は output disclosure に属します。

decision_note.zh: 若决定发生在模型或工具执行前并形成输入 package，归上下文组装；若决定发生在结果产生后并绑定 audience，归输出披露。
decision_note.en: If the decision occurs before model or tool execution and forms an input package, it belongs to context assembly; if it occurs after result production and binds an audience, it belongs to output disclosure.
decision_note.ja: model/tool execution 前に input package を作る decision は context assembly、result 生成後に audience を束縛する decision は output disclosure に属します。

decision_note.zh: 若决定发生在模型或工具执行前并形成输入 package，归上下文组装；若决定发生在结果产生后并绑定 audience，归输出披露。

semantic_area.zh: 输入上下文选择与输出披露选择
semantic_area.ja: input context selection と output disclosure selection

overlap_reason.zh: 两者都可能裁剪内容，但前者控制提供给运行的输入，后者控制允许向某受众显示的输出，时间点与政策依据不同。 本条仅记录 ContextPackage、VisibleContextWindow；其 canonical owner 是上下文组装（memory-context），因此 info-output-disclosure 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Both may trim content, but the former controls input supplied to execution while the latter controls output visible to an audience; timing and policy basis differ. This record is limited to ContextPackage, VisibleContextWindow; their canonical owner is Context assembly (memory-context), so info-output-disclosure references these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: どちらも content を trim しますが、前者は execution input、後者は audience-visible output を制御し、時点と policy basis が異なります。 この記録は ContextPackage、VisibleContextWindow だけを対象とし、canonical owner はコンテキスト組み立て（memory-context）です。したがって info-output-disclosure はここでこれらを参照します。

labels.ja: コンテキスト選択判断

short_definitions.zh: 作为信息记录，上下文选择决定由这一事实区分：它记录候选输出、可见窗口、策略依据和预期披露结果；它治理披露活动，但不亲自执行选择、截断或抑制。
short_definitions.en: Context selection decision belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records candidate output, visible window, policy basis, and intended disclosure outcome; it governs disclosure activity but does not itself select, truncate, or suppress content.
short_definitions.ja: コンテキスト選択判断は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：文脈選択判断は候補出力、可視窓、方針根拠、予定開示結果を記録します。

definitions.zh: 作为信息记录，上下文选择决定由这一事实区分：它记录候选输出、可见窗口、策略依据和预期披露结果；它治理披露活动，但不亲自执行选择、截断或抑制。
definitions.en: Context selection decision belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records candidate output, visible window, policy basis, and intended disclosure outcome; it governs disclosure activity but does not itself select, truncate, or suppress content.
definitions.ja: コンテキスト選択判断は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：文脈選択判断は候補出力、可視窓、方針根拠、予定開示結果を記録します。 開示活動を統治しますが、自ら選択、切詰め、抑制を実行しません。

why_needed.zh: 上下文选择决定为canonical 事实 ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow（ContextSelectionDecision selects_from VisibleContextWindow）提供明确端点并保持与 VisibleContextWindow 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: context selection decision provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow (ContextSelectionDecision selects_from VisibleContextWindow) while preserving its reviewed boundary from VisibleContextWindow.
why_needed.ja: コンテキスト選択判断はcanonical 事実 ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow（ContextSelectionDecision selects_from VisibleContextWindow）の明確な端点を提供し、VisibleContextWindow との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的上下文选择决定：作为信息记录，上下文选择决定由这一事实区分：它记录候选输出、可见窗口、策略依据和预期披露结果；它治理披露活动，但不亲自执行选择、截断或抑制。；该种差可由关系 ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes context selection decision records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Context selection decision belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records candidate output, visible window, policy basis, and intended disclosure outcome; it governs disclosure activity but does not itself select, truncate, or suppress content. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすコンテキスト選択判断を含みます：コンテキスト選択判断は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：文脈選択判断は候補出力、可視窓、方針根拠、予定開示結果を記録します。 開示活動を統治しますが、自ら選択、切詰め、抑制を実行しません。 種差は関係 ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 可见上下文窗口只是关系 ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow 的另一端；相关联不表示它是上下文选择决定。
excludes.en: VisibleContextWindow is only the other endpoint of ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow; relatedness does not make it a ContextSelectionDecision.
excludes.ja: VisibleContextWindow は ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで ContextSelectionDecision にはなりません。

labels.en: Positive example of context selection decision
labels.ja: コンテキスト選択判断の正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次多模态助手的上下文准备运行中，系统将上下文选择决定（ContextSelectionDecision）记录为 ContextSelectionDecision selects_from VisibleContextWindow 的源端点。其已审查定义是“作为信息记录，上下文选择决定由这一事实区分：它记录候选输出、可见窗口、策略依据和预期披露结果；它治理披露活动，但不亲自执行选择、截断或抑制”。
descriptions.en: During a multimodal assistant run for context preparation, the system records context selection decision (ContextSelectionDecision) as the source of ContextSelectionDecision selects_from VisibleContextWindow. Its reviewed definition is “Context selection decision belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records candidate output, visible window, policy basis, and intended disclosure outcome; it governs disclosure activity but does not itself select, truncate, or suppress content”.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムはコンテキスト選択判断（ContextSelectionDecision）を ContextSelectionDecision selects_from VisibleContextWindow の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「コンテキスト選択判断は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：文脈選択判断は候補出力、可視窓、方針根拠、予定開示結果を記録します。 開示活動を統治しますが、自ら選択、切詰め、抑制を実行しません」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 ContextSelectionDecision 以及方向保持不变的事实 ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow。
expected_result.en: The run can query ContextSelectionDecision together with direction-preserving fact ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow.
expected_result.ja: この実行では ContextSelectionDecision と方向を保持した事実 ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.zh: 上下文选择决定边界例
labels.en: Boundary case for context selection decision
labels.ja: コンテキスト選択判断の境界例

descriptions.zh: VisibleContextWindow 用作ContextSelectionDecision的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 VisibleContextWindow 的已审查定义是“可见上下文窗口是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：VisibleContextWindow 表达选择与裁剪后实际可见的上下文快照，不是窗口选择规范；规范仍由 OutputWindow 拥有。”。不能因 relation ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow 而把它归入ContextSelectionDecision。
descriptions.en: VisibleContextWindow is the boundary contrast for ContextSelectionDecision. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but VisibleContextWindow's reviewed definition is “Visible context window is an information record; its differentiating condition is that VisibleContextWindow denotes the actual context snapshot visible after selection and trimming, not a window-selection specification; OutputWindow retains the specification semantics.”. relation ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow does not make it a ContextSelectionDecision.
descriptions.ja: VisibleContextWindow は ContextSelectionDecision の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、VisibleContextWindow の審査済み定義は「可視コンテキストウィンドウは情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：VisibleContextWindow は選択・裁剪後に実際に可視となるコンテキストスナップショットであり、窓選択仕様ではありません。 仕様は OutputWindow が保持します。」です。relation ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow だけで ContextSelectionDecision にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: VisibleContextWindow 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 ContextSelectionDecision。
expected_result.en: VisibleContextWindow retains its own type; validation must not promote it to ContextSelectionDecision from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: VisibleContextWindow は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで ContextSelectionDecision へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、ContextSelectionDecision-selects_from-VisibleContextWindow の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 ContextSelectionDecision（上下文选择决定）由 info-output-disclosure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次 DisclosureActivity、其选择/截断/抑制/发布阶段、面向受众的 DisclosureRecord 或实际显示范围决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms ContextSelectionDecision (context selection decision) is owned by info-output-disclosure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one DisclosureActivity, its selection, truncation, suppression, or publication phase, an audience-facing DisclosureRecord, or an actual displayed range.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は ContextSelectionDecision（コンテキスト選択判断）を info-output-disclosure が「対象が一 DisclosureActivity、その selection/truncation/suppression/publication phase、audience-facing DisclosureRecord、actual displayed range で識別される場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 ContextSelectionDecision 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 DisclosureRecord-records_decision-ContextSelectionDecision，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=DisclosureRecord-records_decision-ContextSelectionDecision；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms ContextSelectionDecision has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone DisclosureRecord-records_decision-ContextSelectionDecision, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=DisclosureRecord-records_decision-ContextSelectionDecision; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は ContextSelectionDecision の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が DisclosureRecord-records_decision-ContextSelectionDecision であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=DisclosureRecord-records_decision-ContextSelectionDecision、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: ContextSelectionDecision 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for ContextSelectionDecision were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ContextSelectionDecision の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 上下文选择决定已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: context selection decision was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: コンテキスト選択判断は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 已披露输出片段属于披露审计记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它表示已经对接收方或下游上下文可见的输出段，并携带引用和边界元数据。
short_definitions.en: Disclosed output segment is a disclosure audit artifact whose defining condition is that it represents an output segment that has been made visible to a recipient or downstream context together with citation and boundary metadata.
short_definitions.ja: 開示済み出力区間は開示監査成果物のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：開示済み出力セグメントは、受信者または下流コンテキストに見えるようになった出力部分を表し、引用と境界メタデータを持ちます。

definitions.zh: 已披露输出片段属于披露审计记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它表示已经对接收方或下游上下文可见的输出段，并携带引用和边界元数据。
definitions.en: Disclosed output segment is a disclosure audit artifact whose defining condition is that it represents an output segment that has been made visible to a recipient or downstream context together with citation and boundary metadata.
definitions.ja: 開示済み出力区間は開示監査成果物のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：開示済み出力セグメントは、受信者または下流コンテキストに見えるようになった出力部分を表し、引用と境界メタデータを持ちます。

why_needed.zh: 已披露输出片段为canonical 事实 displayed_to_actor（DisclosedOutputSegment displayed_to_actor AgentActor）提供明确端点并保持与 SuppressedContext 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: disclosed output segment provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact displayed_to_actor (DisclosedOutputSegment displayed_to_actor AgentActor) while preserving its reviewed boundary from SuppressedContext.
why_needed.ja: 開示済み出力区間はcanonical 事実 displayed_to_actor（DisclosedOutputSegment displayed_to_actor AgentActor）の明確な端点を提供し、SuppressedContext との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的已披露输出片段：已披露输出片段属于披露审计记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它表示已经对接收方或下游上下文可见的输出段，并携带引用和边界元数据。；该种差可由关系 displayed_to_actor 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes disclosed output segment records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Disclosed output segment is a disclosure audit artifact whose defining condition is that it represents an output segment that has been made visible to a recipient or downstream context together with citation and boundary metadata. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in displayed_to_actor.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす開示済み出力区間を含みます：開示済み出力区間は開示監査成果物のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：開示済み出力セグメントは、受信者または下流コンテキストに見えるようになった出力部分を表し、引用と境界メタデータを持ちます。 種差は関係 displayed_to_actor の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 已抑制上下文虽与本概念同属 DisclosureArtifact，但其定义为“已抑制上下文是以如下事实为区分特征的披露审计记录：被抑制上下文记录因策略、信任边界、相关性、隐私或预算限制而被有意排除在可见上下文之外的内容。”，不得替代已披露输出片段。
excludes.en: SuppressedContext shares parent DisclosureArtifact, but its reviewed definition is “Suppressed context is a disclosure audit artifact; its differentiating condition is that it records content intentionally kept out of visible context because of policy, trust boundary, relevance, privacy, or budget constraints.”; it must not be substituted for DisclosedOutputSegment.
excludes.ja: SuppressedContext は同じ上位 DisclosureArtifact を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「抑制済みコンテキストは開示監査成果物の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、方針、信頼境界、関連度、プライバシー、予算制約により可視コンテキストから意図的に外された内容を記録します。」であり、DisclosedOutputSegment の代用にはできません。

labels.en: Positive example of disclosed output segment
labels.ja: 開示済み出力区間の正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次多模态助手的上下文准备运行中，系统将已披露输出片段（DisclosedOutputSegment）记录为 DisclosedOutputSegment displayed_to_actor AgentActor 的源端点。其已审查定义是“已披露输出片段属于披露审计记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它表示已经对接收方或下游上下文可见的输出段，并携带引用和边界元数据”。
descriptions.en: During a multimodal assistant run for context preparation, the system records disclosed output segment (DisclosedOutputSegment) as the source of DisclosedOutputSegment displayed_to_actor AgentActor. Its reviewed definition is “Disclosed output segment is a disclosure audit artifact whose defining condition is that it represents an output segment that has been made visible to a recipient or downstream context together with citation and boundary metadata”.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムは開示済み出力区間（DisclosedOutputSegment）を DisclosedOutputSegment displayed_to_actor AgentActor の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「開示済み出力区間は開示監査成果物のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：開示済み出力セグメントは、受信者または下流コンテキストに見えるようになった出力部分を表し、引用と境界メタデータを持ちます」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 DisclosedOutputSegment 以及方向保持不变的事实 displayed_to_actor。
expected_result.en: The run can query DisclosedOutputSegment together with direction-preserving fact displayed_to_actor.
expected_result.ja: この実行では DisclosedOutputSegment と方向を保持した事実 displayed_to_actor を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、displayed_to_actor 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of displayed_to_actor, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、displayed_to_actor の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: SuppressedContext 用作DisclosedOutputSegment的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 SuppressedContext 的已审查定义是“已抑制上下文是以如下事实为区分特征的披露审计记录：被抑制上下文记录因策略、信任边界、相关性、隐私或预算限制而被有意排除在可见上下文之外的内容。”。不能因 shared parent DisclosureArtifact 而把它归入DisclosedOutputSegment。
descriptions.en: SuppressedContext is the boundary contrast for DisclosedOutputSegment. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but SuppressedContext's reviewed definition is “Suppressed context is a disclosure audit artifact; its differentiating condition is that it records content intentionally kept out of visible context because of policy, trust boundary, relevance, privacy, or budget constraints.”. shared parent DisclosureArtifact does not make it a DisclosedOutputSegment.
descriptions.ja: SuppressedContext は DisclosedOutputSegment の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、SuppressedContext の審査済み定義は「抑制済みコンテキストは開示監査成果物の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、方針、信頼境界、関連度、プライバシー、予算制約により可視コンテキストから意図的に外された内容を記録します。」です。shared parent DisclosureArtifact だけで DisclosedOutputSegment にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: SuppressedContext 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DisclosedOutputSegment。
expected_result.en: SuppressedContext retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DisclosedOutputSegment from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: SuppressedContext は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DisclosedOutputSegment へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 displayed_to_actor 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of displayed_to_actor; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、displayed_to_actor の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 DisclosedOutputSegment（已披露输出片段）由 info-output-disclosure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次 DisclosureActivity、其选择/截断/抑制/发布阶段、面向受众的 DisclosureRecord 或实际显示范围决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms DisclosedOutputSegment (disclosed output segment) is owned by info-output-disclosure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one DisclosureActivity, its selection, truncation, suppression, or publication phase, an audience-facing DisclosureRecord, or an actual displayed range.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は DisclosedOutputSegment（開示済み出力区間）を info-output-disclosure が「対象が一 DisclosureActivity、その selection/truncation/suppression/publication phase、audience-facing DisclosureRecord、actual displayed range で識別される場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 DisclosedOutputSegment 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms DisclosedOutputSegment has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は DisclosedOutputSegment の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: DisclosedOutputSegment 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for DisclosedOutputSegment were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: DisclosedOutputSegment の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 已披露输出片段已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: disclosed output segment was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 開示済み出力区間は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 已审查兄弟区分：父节点 DisclosureArtifact：DisclosedOutputSegment（semantic kind=information，骨架 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact）；SuppressedContext（semantic kind=information，骨架 SuppressedContext-is_a-DisclosureArtifact）。双端条件：DisclosedOutputSegment 条件：“已披露输出片段属于披露审计记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它表示已经对接收方或下游上下文可见的输出段，并携带引用和边界元数据”；SuppressedContext 条件：“已抑制上下文是以如下事实为区分特征的披露审计记录：被抑制上下文记录因策略、信任边界、相关性、隐私或预算限制而被有意排除在可见上下文之外的内容”。任一条件成立不推出另一端。
differentia.en: Reviewed sibling distinction: parent DisclosureArtifact: DisclosedOutputSegment (semantic kind=information, backbone DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact); SuppressedContext (semantic kind=information, backbone SuppressedContext-is_a-DisclosureArtifact). Endpoint conditions: DisclosedOutputSegment condition: “Disclosed output segment is a disclosure audit artifact whose defining condition is that it represents an output segment that has been made visible to a recipient or downstream context together with citation and boundary metadata”; SuppressedContext condition: “Suppressed context is a disclosure audit artifact; its differentiating condition is that it records content intentionally kept out of visible context because of policy, trust boundary, relevance, privacy, or budget constraints”. Either condition leaves the other unproven.
differentia.ja: 審査済み兄弟区別：親 DisclosureArtifact：DisclosedOutputSegment（semantic kind=information、バックボーン DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact）；SuppressedContext（semantic kind=information、バックボーン SuppressedContext-is_a-DisclosureArtifact）。両端条件：DisclosedOutputSegment の条件：「開示済み出力区間は開示監査成果物のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：開示済み出力セグメントは、受信者または下流コンテキストに見えるようになった出力部分を表し、引用と境界メタデータを持ちます」；SuppressedContext の条件：「抑制済みコンテキストは開示監査成果物の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、方針、信頼境界、関連度、プライバシー、予算制約により可視コンテキストから意図的に外された内容を記録します」。一方の成立は他方を証明しません。

short_definitions.zh: 输出披露活动属于活动，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它根据受众、可见窗口与安全决策，对运行输出执行选择、截断、抑制或发布并产生披露记录。
short_definitions.en: Output disclosure activity is an activity whose defining condition is that it applies selection, truncation, suppression, or publication to runtime output under audience, visible-window, and safety decisions and produces a disclosure record.
short_definitions.ja: 出力開示活動は活動のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは受信者、可視窓、安全判断に基づき実行出力を選択、切詰め、抑制、公開し、開示記録を生成します。

definitions.zh: 输出披露活动属于活动，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它根据受众、可见窗口与安全决策，对运行输出执行选择、截断、抑制或发布并产生披露记录。
definitions.en: Output disclosure activity is an activity whose defining condition is that it applies selection, truncation, suppression, or publication to runtime output under audience, visible-window, and safety decisions and produces a disclosure record.
definitions.ja: 出力開示活動は活動のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは受信者、可視窓、安全判断に基づき実行出力を選択、切詰め、抑制、公開し、開示記録を生成します。

why_needed.zh: 输出披露活动为canonical 事实 DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure（DisclosureActivity governed_by ProgressiveDisclosure）提供明确端点并保持与 ProgressiveDisclosure 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Output disclosure activity provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure (DisclosureActivity governed_by ProgressiveDisclosure) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ProgressiveDisclosure.
why_needed.ja: 出力開示活動はcanonical 事実 DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure（DisclosureActivity governed_by ProgressiveDisclosure）の明確な端点を提供し、ProgressiveDisclosure との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的输出披露活动：输出披露活动属于活动，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它根据受众、可见窗口与安全决策，对运行输出执行选择、截断、抑制或发布并产生披露记录。；该种差可由关系 DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Output disclosure activity records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Output disclosure activity is an activity whose defining condition is that it applies selection, truncation, suppression, or publication to runtime output under audience, visible-window, and safety decisions and produces a disclosure record. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす出力開示活動を含みます：出力開示活動は活動のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは受信者、可視窓、安全判断に基づき実行出力を選択、切詰め、抑制、公開し、開示記録を生成します。 種差は関係 DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 渐进式披露只是关系 DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure 的另一端；相关联不表示它是输出披露活动。
excludes.en: ProgressiveDisclosure is only the other endpoint of DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure; relatedness does not make it a DisclosureActivity.
excludes.ja: ProgressiveDisclosure は DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで DisclosureActivity にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: ProgressiveDisclosure 用作DisclosureActivity的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 ProgressiveDisclosure 的已审查定义是“渐进式披露属于披露控制活动，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：渐进披露记录在策略、信任边界和上下文窗口约束下分阶段释放内容的控制模式。”。不能因 relation DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure 而把它归入DisclosureActivity。
descriptions.en: ProgressiveDisclosure is the boundary contrast for DisclosureActivity. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but ProgressiveDisclosure's reviewed definition is “Progressive disclosure is a disclosure-control activity whose defining condition is that it records a controlled release pattern in which content is revealed in stages under policy, trust-boundary, and context-window constraints.”. relation DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure does not make it a DisclosureActivity.
descriptions.ja: ProgressiveDisclosure は DisclosureActivity の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、ProgressiveDisclosure の審査済み定義は「段階的開示は開示制御活動のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、ポリシー、信頼境界、コンテキストウィンドウの制約下で内容を段階的に公開する制御パターンを記録します。」です。relation DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure だけで DisclosureActivity にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: ProgressiveDisclosure 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DisclosureActivity。
expected_result.en: ProgressiveDisclosure retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DisclosureActivity from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: ProgressiveDisclosure は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DisclosureActivity へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of DisclosureActivity-governed_by-ProgressiveDisclosure; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 DisclosureActivity（输出披露活动）由 info-output-disclosure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次 DisclosureActivity、其选择/截断/抑制/发布阶段、面向受众的 DisclosureRecord 或实际显示范围决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms DisclosureActivity (Output disclosure activity) is owned by info-output-disclosure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one DisclosureActivity, its selection, truncation, suppression, or publication phase, an audience-facing DisclosureRecord, or an actual displayed range.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は DisclosureActivity（出力開示活動）を info-output-disclosure が「対象が一 DisclosureActivity、その selection/truncation/suppression/publication phase、audience-facing DisclosureRecord、actual displayed range で識別される場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 DisclosureActivity 的 semantic kind 为 activity，主父或骨架为 reviewed root module-key-root，并满足“semantic kind=activity；backbone=root_status=module-key-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms DisclosureActivity has semantic kind activity, primary parent or backbone reviewed root module-key-root, and invariants “semantic kind=activity; backbone=root_status=module-key-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は DisclosureActivity の semantic kind が activity、主親または骨格が reviewed root module-key-root であり、「semantic kind=activity、backbone=root_status=module-key-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: DisclosureActivity 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for DisclosureActivity were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: DisclosureActivity の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 输出披露活动已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Output disclosure activity was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 出力開示活動は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 披露审计记录是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：DisclosureArtifact 是具有身份、产生它的选择或披露活动、接收方、边界、策略依据和被处理内容引用的披露记录；它用于审计披露结果，而不等同于披露策略或活动。
short_definitions.en: Disclosure audit artifact is an information record; its differentiating condition is that disclosureArtifact is identity-bearing information with the producing selection or disclosure activity, recipient, boundary, policy basis, and handled-content reference.
short_definitions.ja: 開示監査成果物は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：DisclosureArtifact は識別・生成選択／開示活動・受信者・境界・方針根拠・処理内容参照を持つ情報成果物で、開示結果を監査し方針や活動自体ではありません。

definitions.zh: 披露审计记录是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：DisclosureArtifact 是具有身份、产生它的选择或披露活动、接收方、边界、策略依据和被处理内容引用的披露记录；它用于审计披露结果，而不等同于披露策略或活动。
definitions.en: Disclosure audit artifact is an information record; its differentiating condition is that disclosureArtifact is identity-bearing information with the producing selection or disclosure activity, recipient, boundary, policy basis, and handled-content reference. It audits disclosure outcomes and is not the disclosure policy or activity.
definitions.ja: 開示監査成果物は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：DisclosureArtifact は識別・生成選択／開示活動・受信者・境界・方針根拠・処理内容参照を持つ情報成果物で、開示結果を監査し方針や活動自体ではありません。

why_needed.zh: 披露审计记录为canonical 事实 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact（DisclosedOutputSegment is_a DisclosureArtifact）提供明确端点并保持与 DisclosedOutputSegment 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: disclosure audit artifact provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact (DisclosedOutputSegment is_a DisclosureArtifact) while preserving its reviewed boundary from DisclosedOutputSegment.
why_needed.ja: 開示監査成果物はcanonical 事実 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact（DisclosedOutputSegment is_a DisclosureArtifact）の明確な端点を提供し、DisclosedOutputSegment との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的披露审计记录：披露审计记录是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：DisclosureArtifact 是具有身份、产生它的选择或披露活动、接收方、边界、策略依据和被处理内容引用的披露记录；它用于审计披露结果，而不等同于披露策略或活动。；该种差可由关系 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes disclosure audit artifact records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Disclosure audit artifact is an information record; its differentiating condition is that disclosureArtifact is identity-bearing information with the producing selection or disclosure activity, recipient, boundary, policy basis, and handled-content reference. It audits disclosure outcomes and is not the disclosure policy or activity. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす開示監査成果物を含みます：開示監査成果物は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：DisclosureArtifact は識別・生成選択／開示活動・受信者・境界・方針根拠・処理内容参照を持つ情報成果物で、開示結果を監査し方針や活動自体ではありません。 種差は関係 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 已披露输出片段只是关系 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact 的另一端；相关联不表示它是披露审计记录。
excludes.en: DisclosedOutputSegment is only the other endpoint of DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact; relatedness does not make it a DisclosureArtifact.
excludes.ja: DisclosedOutputSegment は DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで DisclosureArtifact にはなりません。

labels.en: Positive example of disclosure audit artifact
labels.ja: 開示監査成果物の正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次多模态助手的上下文准备运行中，系统将披露审计记录（DisclosureArtifact）记录为 DisclosedOutputSegment is_a DisclosureArtifact 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“披露审计记录是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：DisclosureArtifact 是具有身份、产生它的选择或披露活动、接收方、边界、策略依据和被处理内容引用的披露记录；它用于审计披露结果，而不等同于披露策略或活动”。
descriptions.en: During a multimodal assistant run for context preparation, the system records disclosure audit artifact (DisclosureArtifact) as the target of DisclosedOutputSegment is_a DisclosureArtifact. Its reviewed definition is “Disclosure audit artifact is an information record; its differentiating condition is that disclosureArtifact is identity-bearing information with the producing selection or disclosure activity, recipient, boundary, policy basis, and handled-content reference. It audits disclosure outcomes and is not the disclosure policy or activity”.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムは開示監査成果物（DisclosureArtifact）を DisclosedOutputSegment is_a DisclosureArtifact の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「開示監査成果物は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：DisclosureArtifact は識別・生成選択／開示活動・受信者・境界・方針根拠・処理内容参照を持つ情報成果物で、開示結果を監査し方針や活動自体ではありません」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 DisclosureArtifact 以及方向保持不变的事实 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact。
expected_result.en: The run can query DisclosureArtifact together with direction-preserving fact DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact.
expected_result.ja: この実行では DisclosureArtifact と方向を保持した事実 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.en: Boundary case for disclosure audit artifact
labels.ja: 開示監査成果物の境界例

descriptions.zh: DisclosedOutputSegment 用作DisclosureArtifact的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DisclosedOutputSegment 的已审查定义是“已披露输出片段属于披露审计记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它表示已经对接收方或下游上下文可见的输出段，并携带引用和边界元数据。”。不能因 relation DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact 而把它归入DisclosureArtifact。
descriptions.en: DisclosedOutputSegment is the boundary contrast for DisclosureArtifact. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DisclosedOutputSegment's reviewed definition is “Disclosed output segment is a disclosure audit artifact whose defining condition is that it represents an output segment that has been made visible to a recipient or downstream context together with citation and boundary metadata.”. relation DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact does not make it a DisclosureArtifact.
descriptions.ja: DisclosedOutputSegment は DisclosureArtifact の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DisclosedOutputSegment の審査済み定義は「開示済み出力区間は開示監査成果物のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：開示済み出力セグメントは、受信者または下流コンテキストに見えるようになった出力部分を表し、引用と境界メタデータを持ちます。」です。relation DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact だけで DisclosureArtifact にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DisclosedOutputSegment 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DisclosureArtifact。
expected_result.en: DisclosedOutputSegment retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DisclosureArtifact from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DisclosedOutputSegment は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DisclosureArtifact へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、DisclosedOutputSegment-is_a-DisclosureArtifact の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

change_note.ja: 開示監査成果物は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 披露发布活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它把允许的最终输出片段释放给目标受众和信任边界。
short_definitions.en: As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure publication activity is distinguished by the fact that it is a Disclosure publication releases the allowed final output segments to the target audience and trust boundary.
short_definitions.ja: 出力開示活動に属する開示公開活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは許可された最終出力断片を対象受信者と信頼境界へ公開します。

definitions.zh: 披露发布活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它把允许的最终输出片段释放给目标受众和信任边界。
definitions.en: As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure publication activity is distinguished by the fact that it is a Disclosure publication releases the allowed final output segments to the target audience and trust boundary.
definitions.ja: 出力開示活動に属する開示公開活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは許可された最終出力断片を対象受信者と信頼境界へ公開します。

why_needed.zh: 披露发布活动为canonical 事实 DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment（DisclosurePublicationActivity produces DisclosedOutputSegment）提供明确端点并保持与 DisclosureSelectionActivity 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Disclosure publication activity provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment (DisclosurePublicationActivity produces DisclosedOutputSegment) while preserving its reviewed boundary from DisclosureSelectionActivity.
why_needed.ja: 開示公開活動はcanonical 事実 DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment（DisclosurePublicationActivity produces DisclosedOutputSegment）の明確な端点を提供し、DisclosureSelectionActivity との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的披露发布活动：披露发布活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它把允许的最终输出片段释放给目标受众和信任边界。；该种差可由关系 DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Disclosure publication activity records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure publication activity is distinguished by the fact that it is a Disclosure publication releases the allowed final output segments to the target audience and trust boundary. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす開示公開活動を含みます：出力開示活動に属する開示公開活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは許可された最終出力断片を対象受信者と信頼境界へ公開します。 種差は関係 DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 披露选择活动虽与本概念同属 DisclosureActivity，但其定义为“披露选择活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它确定哪些输出片段有资格进入目标受众的披露候选。”，不得替代披露发布活动。
excludes.en: DisclosureSelectionActivity shares parent DisclosureActivity, but its reviewed definition is “As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure selection activity is distinguished by the fact that it determines which output segments are eligible for a target audience.”; it must not be substituted for DisclosurePublicationActivity.
excludes.ja: DisclosureSelectionActivity は同じ上位 DisclosureActivity を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「出力開示活動に属する開示選択活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは対象受信者への開示候補となる出力断片を決定します。」であり、DisclosurePublicationActivity の代用にはできません。

differentia.zh: 端点特定对照：父节点 DisclosureActivity：DisclosurePublicationActivity（semantic kind=activity，骨架 DisclosurePublicationActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）；DisclosureSelectionActivity（semantic kind=activity，骨架 DisclosureSelectionActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）。双端条件：DisclosurePublicationActivity 条件：“披露发布活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它把允许的最终输出片段释放给目标受众和信任边界”；DisclosureSelectionActivity 条件：“披露选择活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它确定哪些输出片段有资格进入目标受众的披露候选”。条件不得互借；各自成立后方可归类。
differentia.en: Endpoint-specific contrast: parent DisclosureActivity: DisclosurePublicationActivity (semantic kind=activity, backbone DisclosurePublicationActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity); DisclosureSelectionActivity (semantic kind=activity, backbone DisclosureSelectionActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity). Endpoint conditions: DisclosurePublicationActivity condition: “As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure publication activity is distinguished by the fact that it is a Disclosure publication releases the allowed final output segments to the target audience and trust boundary”; DisclosureSelectionActivity condition: “As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure selection activity is distinguished by the fact that it determines which output segments are eligible for a target audience”. Conditions cannot be borrowed; classify each endpoint only from its own evidence.
differentia.ja: 端点別対照：親 DisclosureActivity：DisclosurePublicationActivity（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン DisclosurePublicationActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）；DisclosureSelectionActivity（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン DisclosureSelectionActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）。両端条件：DisclosurePublicationActivity の条件：「出力開示活動に属する開示公開活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは許可された最終出力断片を対象受信者と信頼境界へ公開します」；DisclosureSelectionActivity の条件：「出力開示活動に属する開示選択活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは対象受信者への開示候補となる出力断片を決定します」。条件を流用せず、各端を固有の証拠で分類します。

differentia.zh: 已审查兄弟区分：父节点 DisclosureActivity：DisclosurePublicationActivity（semantic kind=activity，骨架 DisclosurePublicationActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）；DisclosureRecord（semantic kind=information，骨架 DisclosureActivity-produces-DisclosureRecord）。双端条件：DisclosurePublicationActivity 条件：“披露发布活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它把允许的最终输出片段释放给目标受众和信任边界”；DisclosureRecord 条件：“输出披露记录是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它是一次披露活动的可审计信息，记录目标受众、内容引用、适用决策以及显示、截断或抑制结果”。任一条件成立不推出另一端。
differentia.en: Reviewed sibling distinction: parent DisclosureActivity: DisclosurePublicationActivity (semantic kind=activity, backbone DisclosurePublicationActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity); DisclosureRecord (semantic kind=information, backbone DisclosureActivity-produces-DisclosureRecord). Endpoint conditions: DisclosurePublicationActivity condition: “As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure publication activity is distinguished by the fact that it is a Disclosure publication releases the allowed final output segments to the target audience and trust boundary”; DisclosureRecord condition: “As an information record, Output disclosure record is distinguished by the fact that it is auditable information for one disclosure activity, recording target audience, content references, applicable decisions, and a shown, truncated, or suppressed outcome”. Either condition leaves the other unproven.
differentia.ja: 審査済み兄弟区別：親 DisclosureActivity：DisclosurePublicationActivity（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン DisclosurePublicationActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）；DisclosureRecord（semantic kind=information、バックボーン DisclosureActivity-produces-DisclosureRecord）。両端条件：DisclosurePublicationActivity の条件：「出力開示活動に属する開示公開活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは許可された最終出力断片を対象受信者と信頼境界へ公開します」；DisclosureRecord の条件：「情報記録に属する出力開示記録は、次の事実を種差とします：それは一回の開示活動を監査する情報で、対象受信者、内容参照、適用判断、表示・切詰め・抑制結果を記録します」。一方の成立は他方を証明しません。

differentia.zh: 正向身份比较：父节点 DisclosureActivity：DisclosurePublicationActivity（semantic kind=activity，骨架 DisclosurePublicationActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）；DisclosureSuppressionActivity（semantic kind=activity，骨架 DisclosureSuppressionActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）。双端条件：DisclosurePublicationActivity 条件：“披露发布活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它把允许的最终输出片段释放给目标受众和信任边界”；DisclosureSuppressionActivity 条件：“作为输出披露活动，披露抑制活动由这一事实区分：它阻止不满足授权或安全条件的内容到达目标受众”。仅依据各自定义与骨架逐端验证。
differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent DisclosureActivity: DisclosurePublicationActivity (semantic kind=activity, backbone DisclosurePublicationActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity); DisclosureSuppressionActivity (semantic kind=activity, backbone DisclosureSuppressionActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity). Endpoint conditions: DisclosurePublicationActivity condition: “As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure publication activity is distinguished by the fact that it is a Disclosure publication releases the allowed final output segments to the target audience and trust boundary”; DisclosureSuppressionActivity condition: “Disclosure suppression activity belongs to the Output disclosure activity category and differs from broader members in that it is a Disclosure suppression prevents content that fails authorization or safety conditions from reaching the target audience”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 DisclosureActivity：DisclosurePublicationActivity（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン DisclosurePublicationActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）；DisclosureSuppressionActivity（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン DisclosureSuppressionActivity-is_a-DisclosureActivity）。両端条件：DisclosurePublicationActivity の条件：「出力開示活動に属する開示公開活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは許可された最終出力断片を対象受信者と信頼境界へ公開します」；DisclosureSuppressionActivity の条件：「開示抑制活動は出力開示活動として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは認可または安全条件を満たさない内容が対象受信者へ届くのを防ぎます」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

labels.en: Positive example of Disclosure publication activity

descriptions.zh: 在一次多模态助手的上下文准备运行中，系统将披露发布活动（DisclosurePublicationActivity）记录为 DisclosurePublicationActivity produces DisclosedOutputSegment 的源端点。其已审查定义是“披露发布活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它把允许的最终输出片段释放给目标受众和信任边界”。
descriptions.en: During a multimodal assistant run for context preparation, the system records Disclosure publication activity (DisclosurePublicationActivity) as the source of DisclosurePublicationActivity produces DisclosedOutputSegment. Its reviewed definition is “As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure publication activity is distinguished by the fact that it is a Disclosure publication releases the allowed final output segments to the target audience and trust boundary”.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムは開示公開活動（DisclosurePublicationActivity）を DisclosurePublicationActivity produces DisclosedOutputSegment の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「出力開示活動に属する開示公開活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは許可された最終出力断片を対象受信者と信頼境界へ公開します」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 DisclosurePublicationActivity 以及方向保持不变的事实 DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment。
expected_result.en: The run can query DisclosurePublicationActivity together with direction-preserving fact DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment.
expected_result.ja: この実行では DisclosurePublicationActivity と方向を保持した事実 DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.en: Boundary case for Disclosure publication activity
labels.ja: 開示公開活動の境界例

descriptions.zh: DisclosureSelectionActivity 用作DisclosurePublicationActivity的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DisclosureSelectionActivity 的已审查定义是“披露选择活动是一种输出披露活动；其区分条件是：它确定哪些输出片段有资格进入目标受众的披露候选。”。不能因 shared parent DisclosureActivity 而把它归入DisclosurePublicationActivity。
descriptions.en: DisclosureSelectionActivity is the boundary contrast for DisclosurePublicationActivity. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DisclosureSelectionActivity's reviewed definition is “As an Output disclosure activity, Disclosure selection activity is distinguished by the fact that it determines which output segments are eligible for a target audience.”. shared parent DisclosureActivity does not make it a DisclosurePublicationActivity.
descriptions.ja: DisclosureSelectionActivity は DisclosurePublicationActivity の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DisclosureSelectionActivity の審査済み定義は「出力開示活動に属する開示選択活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは対象受信者への開示候補となる出力断片を決定します。」です。shared parent DisclosureActivity だけで DisclosurePublicationActivity にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DisclosureSelectionActivity 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DisclosurePublicationActivity。
expected_result.en: DisclosureSelectionActivity retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DisclosurePublicationActivity from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DisclosureSelectionActivity は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DisclosurePublicationActivity へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、DisclosurePublicationActivity-produces-DisclosedOutputSegment の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。
